glosses.en: go to bed; put to bed
glosses.de: ins Bett gehen; zu Bett bringen
glosses.it: andare a letto; mettere a letto
glosses.nl: naar bed gaan; naar bed brengen
glosses.el: πάω για ύπνο; βάζω για ύπνο
glosses.sv: gå och lägga sig; lägga i säng
glosses.ro: a se culca; a culca pe cineva
glosses.da: gå i seng; lægge i seng

translations.en: I put the baby to bed.
translations.de: Ich bringe das Baby ins Bett.
translations.pt: Eu coloco o bebê para dormir.
translations.vi: Tôi cho em bé đi ngủ.
translations.nl: Ik leg de baby in bed.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんを寝かせます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Tu couches les enfants à neuf heures.
sentences.reading: /ty kuʃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ a nœv œʁ/

translations.fr: Tu couches les enfants à neuf heures.
translations.ipa: /ty kuʃ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ a nœv œʁ/
translations.en: You put the kids to bed at nine.
translations.es: Acuestas a los niños a las nueve.
translations.de: Du bringst die Kinder um neun ins Bett.
translations.it: Metti a letto i bambini alle nove.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在九点把孩子们哄睡。
translations.yue: 你喺九點哄啲小朋友瞓覺。
translations.ru: Ты укладываешь детей спать в девять.
translations.pt: Você coloca as crianças para dormir às nove.
translations.vi: Bạn cho bọn trẻ đi ngủ lúc chín giờ.
translations.ar: تضع الأطفال في الفراش عند الساعة التاسعة.
translations.nl: Jij legt de kinderen om negen uur in bed.
translations.uk: Ти вкладаєш дітей спати о дев’ятій.
translations.hi: तुम बच्चों को नौ बजे सुलाते हो.
translations.el: Βάζεις τα παιδιά για ύπνο στις εννιά.
translations.id: Kamu menidurkan anak-anak pada jam sembilan.
translations.ro: Pui copiii la culcare la ora nouă.
translations.cs: Ukládáš děti ke spánku v devět.
translations.ja: あなたは子どもたちを九時に寝かせます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a time expression.
Cardinal number; specifies the hour.
Common noun, feminine plural; unit of time in the time expression.

translations.en: We’re going to put the little ones to bed.
translations.es: Vamos a acostar a los pequeños.
translations.de: Wir werden die Kleinen ins Bett bringen.
translations.it: Andiamo a mettere a letto i piccoli.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把小家伙们哄睡觉。
translations.pt: Vamos colocar os pequenos para dormir.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ cho mấy đứa nhỏ đi ngủ.
translations.nl: We gaan de kleintjes in bed leggen.
translations.hi: हम छोटे बच्चों को सुलाने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Θα βάλουμε τα μικρά για ύπνο.
translations.cs: Chystáme se uložit prcky ke spánku.
translations.da: Vi skal lægge de små i seng.
translations.ja: 私たちは小さい子たちを寝かせるつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Subject impersonal pronoun, often used colloquially for 'we'.
Auxiliary 'aller' forming the near future (futur proche), present, 3rd person singular.
Main verb in the infinitive; complement of the auxiliary.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object.
Adjective, masculine plural, used substantively to mean 'the little ones'.

sentences.target: Nous couchons ma nièce après le dîner.
sentences.reading: /nu kuʃɔ̃ ma njɛs apʁɛ lə dine/

translations.fr: Nous couchons ma nièce après le dîner.
translations.ipa: /nu kuʃɔ̃ ma njɛs apʁɛ lə dine/
translations.en: We put my niece to bed after dinner.
translations.es: Acostamos a mi sobrina después de la cena.
translations.de: Wir bringen meine Nichte nach dem Abendessen ins Bett.
translations.it: Mettiamo a letto mia nipote dopo cena.
translations.ko: 우리는 저녁 식사 후에 조카를 재워요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们晚饭后把我侄女哄睡觉。
translations.yue: 我哋喺晚飯之後哄我侄女瞓覺。
translations.ru: Мы укладываем мою племянницу спать после ужина.
translations.pt: Nós colocamos minha sobrinha para dormir depois do jantar.
translations.he: אנחנו משכיבים את האחיינית שלי אחרי ארוחת הערב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cho cháu gái tôi đi ngủ sau bữa tối.
translations.ar: نُدخل ابنة أختي إلى السرير بعد العشاء.
translations.nl: We leggen mijn nichtje na het avondeten in bed.
translations.uk: Ми вкладаємо мою племінницю спати після вечері.
translations.hi: हम रात के खाने के बाद मेरी भतीजी को सुलाते हैं.
translations.pl: Kładziemy moją siostrzenicę spać po kolacji.
translations.el: Βάζουμε την ανιψιά μου για ύπνο μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Vi legger niesen min etter middag.
translations.id: Kami menidurkan keponakan saya setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Vi lägger min systerdotter efter middagen.
translations.ro: Punem nepoata mea la culcare după cină.
translations.cs: Ukládáme mou neteř ke spánku po večeři.
translations.da: Vi lægger min niece i seng efter aftensmad.
translations.ja: 夕食の後で姪を寝かせます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'nièce'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.
